        Kids' Shoes and Clothes

        [1827]

        Kids love to run and play. Explore our latest collection of kids' shoes and clothes to support busy kids. From everyday hoodies and tees to kids' gym clothes that keep them on the move indoors and out, we have the trending styles and technologies to keep kids smiling from school days to soccer practice and beyond.

        adidas Kids' Shoes and Clothes

        School day or soccer practice, keep your young athlete on the move with the latest in kids' sneakers and activewear from adidas. Build your own school uniform with the most popular tees, track jackets and sneakers for kids. Black, red, blue, purple, pink or white. Pick their favorite colors and outfit them from head to toe with socks, tights, tank tops and sweatshirts for kids of all ages. Mix and match colors or diversify their choices with fresh prints and designs. However, you can never go wrong with classic solid-color track jackets and pants. And don't forget to add a backpack or gym bag to organize their day.

        Whether your young star never stops moving or prefers focused hangout time, we have the kids' sneakers and activewear to match their activity level. From cushioned everyday sneakers to dedicated soccer cleats and running shoes, we offer a range of trending clothes and shoes for kids of all ages. When it comes to sports, keep them comfortable and free to move in kids' gym clothes. Meet the school dress code and get them the clothes they want to wear. Explore collaborations featuring their favorite superheroes or support their favorite team with official team fan wear. Regardless, you can count on adidas for the best selection of kids' shoes and clothes.

        Your opinion counts
